name: Coventry, Harlequin, Holiday, Fruit & Nut Cheese Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the cream and cheddar cheeses until smooth.
2. Add onion, parsley, Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce, and salt; mix well to combine.
3. Shape the mixture into a ball.
4. Chill and serve with assorted crackers if desired.
Harlequin Cheese Ball:
5. Add 2 tablespoons finely diced pimiento, 1 teaspoon prepared brown mustard, and 1 clove garlic (crushed) to the basic cheese mixture.
6. Shape into a ball and garnish with pimiento stars if desired.
Holiday Cheese Ball:
7. Add 1 tablespoon caraway seeds to the basic cheese mixture.
8. Shape into a ball and chill.
9. Sprinkle ribbons of paprika and chopped parsley around the ball.
Fruit & Nut Cheese Ball:
10. Add 1 can (8 ¼ ounces) crushed pineapple, drained well, and 1/3 cup finely chopped nuts to the basic cheese mixture.
11. Shape into a ball; roll in 1/3 cup finely chopped nuts.
12. Chill.
